prompt: Show me the most recent AP bills we've received in Acumatica.

score.finalText:
Most recent AP bills showing in live Acumatica are below. One issue: the raw result is not sorted cleanly by bill date across all records, so I’m listing the newest-dated items from what came back and calling out that the feed looks noisy.

| Bill # | Vendor | Bill Date | Due Date | Amount | Status | Description |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|
| 002815 | GARDOOR | 2025-12-17 | 2525-01-02 | $1,189.39 | Closed | Backcharge for cost to repair dock leveler conduit damaged by dock leveler installers. 10 hours |
| 002462 | LLUM | 2025-09-24 | 2025-10-24 | $1.25 | Closed | Controller Services for Sept 2025 adj |
| 002463 | LLUM | 2025-09-24 | 2025-10-24 | $1.25 | Closed | Controller Services for Sept 2025 adj |
| 002109 | CHRISTIAN | 2025-06-30 | 2025-06-30 | $900.00 | Closed | Goodwill Foundations |
| 003436 | KIMHOR | 2026-03-01 | 2026-03-01 | $13,550.00 | Closed | 170569001-0126 For Services Rendered through Jan 31, 2026 |
| 003469 | KIMHOR | 2026-03-01 | 2026-03-01 | $14,350.00 | Closed | Credit for double payment - Original payment ref 002397 |

What stands out:
- Everything returned is **Closed** with **$0 balance**.
- There’s at least one obvious data anomaly: **GARDOOR due date = 2525-01-02**, which is wrong.
- The returned set also mixes in older 2022–2024 records, so this is not a clean “latest first” stream.

If you want, I can tighten this up one of two ways:
1. show only **open/recent AP bills**, or  
2. pull a **clean vendor-focused AP view** for someone like Kimley-Horn, ProOut, or another vendor.

bills.description: Invoice 1 (Pay App # 1 - Turf and Fence Installation)
Backcharge for cost to repair dock leveler conduit damaged by dock leveler installers. 10 hours
Credit for double payment - Original payment ref 002397
Demo, Framing, Ceiling - To correct to Bill pushed from Procore
